text:
#Youth Review : "Ken Karunaas shines in a cheeky, harmless coming-of-age entertainer

[ RATINGS :  7/10 ]

POSITIVES 
👉Ken Karunas Energetic Performance 
👉Strong Casting Performance
👉Enjoyable Friend gang sequence
👉Suraj Venjramoodu & Devadarshni Emotional Performance 
👉GV Prakash Worthy BGM & Songs 
👉Anishma Cute Performance 
👉Relatable Coming of age moments 
👉Surprising Intervel Block
👉Engaging Second Half 
👉Satisfactory Climax Portion

NEGATIVES 
👉Familiar Storyline 
👉Cliche Love Triangle Sequences 
👉Too much cinematic liberties & Logical Mistakes 
👉Bit Streached First Half

Final Verdict 
Overall, Youth is a fun youthful entertainer that works with its energetic moments, relatable emotions, and engaging performances. Ken Karunas impresses with his confident screen presence, and the film delivers a decent mix of humor and sentiment despite a few predictable scenes. A satisfying watch for youngsters and fans of light-hearted dramas.

author: @suryar3641
video_title: 🔴BLAST PUBLIC REVIEW | Blast Movie Review #blastreview #Arjun | Tamil Cinema Review

text:
Today I watched the movie Blast, and it turned out to be a complete family entertainer. The action sequences were absolutely next level, and full credit goes to the director for creating such a gripping experience that keeps the audience on the edge of their seats throughout the film.
The movie beautifully portrays an entire family of fighters, with the one and only Action King Arjun Sarja delivering a powerful performance along with intense action scenes. The excitement reaches another level when Abhirami and their daughter Preethi showcase their martial arts skills. Their performances deserve special appreciation because the fight sequences looked completely natural and realistic, never once appearing rehearsed or artificial. Hats off to both of them for their valiant effort and screen presence.
The background score was good and supported the film well, though it could have been even better in certain moments. Still, the director deserves immense appreciation for scripting every scene with care and keeping the audience engaged from start to finish.
A must-watch film for the entire family — do watch it in theatres and enjoy the experience together!

text:
IDHAYAM MURALI is easily one of the coolest, most romantic, and stylish Tamil movies I've watched in recent times. It beautifully takes us on a nostalgic journey to the '90s while seamlessly blending it with the 2000s, making it a perfect treat for both 90s and 2K kids. A few scenes shot in Times Square add a grand, vibrant, and visually refreshing touch to the film.

There isn't a single dull or dragging moment. Not once did I feel like reaching for my phone. No unnecessary melodrama and just pure, realistic fun and wholesome entertainment from start to finish.

Note : This movie should be watched only with family / gang of friends/ or gf 🫶😀

The Characters ++++ Sudhakar, Adharva Murali, Niharika, Angelin, Rakshan, Dravid, Natty, Thaman, Jonita, and especially Fahadh Faasil. His climax entry scene was absolutely electrifying and completely worth the wait. I genuinely enjoyed watching a feel good, happy movie after a long time.

I personally feel Sudhakar from Parithabangal has the potential to become the next Yogi Babu or perhaps even surpass him. Both the heroines, Kayadu Lohar and Preity Mukundan, have tremendous screen presence and could well become the next Gen Simran/Trisha/Nayanthara/Tamannaah.

I know (Aakash Baskaran) is another 200 rs oopee talented slave who is heavily involved in many illegal and anti social activities. 

Dear Aakash kindly focus only on movies that can grow you just like this movie with note worthy cinematography and camera works.

IDHAYAM MURALI doesn't just entertain it keeps you engaged throughout with its twists, comedy, romance, and action, all placed exactly where they're needed.

The only thing I didn't like was the Red Giant reference, which felt unnecessary. Likewise, the dialogue during the Tamil cricket commentary by Tiger Garden Thangadurai came across as a political jab shows how low DMK can go to any extent and kneel down . 🔴⚫

While I wouldn't say the songs are exceptional, the background score beautifully elevates the romantic and emotional moments, leaving you with a warm, feel-good vibe.

After delivering an awful film like PARA-SHAKTHI, IDHAYAM MURALI could very well be the game-changer that Adharva needed.
